title: Footfall Forecasting × Met Office × Local Events × Transport Disruption (Retail)
summary: School-term page reachable; Met Office DataPoint requires free key (MET_OFFICE_DATAPOINT_KEY). Recipe published-literature support is strong (footfall vs weather is a well-established regression in UK retail).

evidence.claim: Met Office DataPoint + school term dates + local-event sources reachable
